VAL-TP-PREFILL-001.evidence: Infrastructure verified but full cosine similarity comparison vs single-GPU prefill not tested. The validation test focuses on infrastructure validation (weight sharding, methods, allreduce). Test output: 'Weight Sharding: PASS', 'TP FFN GEMM Execution: PASS', 'Output Sanity: PASS'
VAL-TP-PREFILL-001.notes: Full correctness validation (cosine similarity vs single-GPU) requires comparison test with actual prefill execution. Current test validates infrastructure only.

VAL-TP-PREFILL-002.evidence: Throughput: 0.0 tok/s. Performance target (1000 tok/s) not met.
VAL-TP-PREFILL-002.notes: The validation test reports 'Performance: FAIL (initial baseline)'. The infrastructure is functional but throughput optimization is deferred. Test does not run actual timed prefill.

VAL-TP-PREFILL-003.evidence: KV cache sharding verified: 1 KV head per GPU, 8 Q heads per GPU. P2P allreduce initialized. TP size verified: 4.
VAL-TP-PREFILL-003.notes: FlashAttention validation shows 'KV cache sharding verified: 1 KV heads/GPU ✓' and 'Q heads sharding verified: 8 Q heads/GPU ✓'. Infrastructure ready for TP-sharded attention.
